---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new statistical method, effect type, plot, or UI improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like added or changed?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Use case**
What analysis or workflow does this enable? Who needs it?

**Reference implementation**
<!-- Is this available in metafor, JASP, or another tool? A function name or paper citation helps scope the work. -->

**Is there a published method to implement?**
<!-- If yes, please cite it -->

**Alternatives you've considered**
<!-- Any workarounds you currently use, or related features already in FOSMA -->
